description: Tim Roughgarden discusses the concept of slashing in blockchain consensus protocols, emphasizing its importance for maintaining correctness and preventing violations of consistency and liveness. He explains how slashing can identify and punish validators responsible for protocol failures, particularly in proof of stake systems like Solana.
topic_summary: The talk covers blockchain consensus, focusing on slashing as a mechanism to ensure consistency and liveness in protocols. Roughgarden highlights the challenges posed by adversarial actors and the role of slashing in mitigating these risks [t=204.93].
